error_pattern: Type cast 'as' is not valid in Svelte 4 template attribute
solution_script: Move the TypeScript 'as' cast out of the template expression into a $: reactive variable in the <script> block. Example: instead of {(x as MyType)}, add '$: typedX = x as MyType' and use {typedX} in the template.

error_pattern: Unexpected token TypeScript cast in Svelte template
solution_script: Svelte 4 does not support TypeScript casts inside template expressions. Move the cast to a helper function in the script block or use a $: reactive declaration.

error_pattern: onMount return type Promise is not assignable to void
solution_script: Cast onMount to accept async cleanup: (onMount as (fn: () => Promise<() => void>) => void)(async () => { ... return cleanup; }). Or restructure to not return the cleanup from the async function.

error_pattern: Property 'as' cast in Svelte template Expected }
solution_script: Remove TypeScript casts from Svelte 4 template attribute expressions. Use JSDoc comments /** @type */ or move logic to script.

error_pattern: e.target as HTMLInputElement is not valid in Svelte template
solution_script: Use e.currentTarget instead of (e.target as HTMLInputElement) inside Svelte template event handlers. currentTarget is always typed to the element the handler is attached to.

error_pattern: Property 'test' does not exist on type 'UserConfigExport'
solution_script: Move Vitest configuration out of vite.config.ts into a separate vitest.config.ts file with '/// <reference types="vitest" />' at the top, using defineConfig from 'vitest/config'.

error_pattern: cannot find name refreshStatus in catalog.ts
solution_script: Import refreshStatus from ./models: add 'refreshStatus' to the import statement from '$lib/stores/models'.

error_pattern: invoke returns unknown not assignable to any[]
solution_script: Use the generic form of invoke with an explicit type parameter: invoke<any[]>('command_name') instead of invoke('command_name') when assigning to a typed array variable.

error_pattern: No overload matches createEventDispatcher openAndroidUsbLab not assignable
solution_script: Add all dispatched event names to the createEventDispatcher generic type: createEventDispatcher<{ close: void; openAndroidUsbLab: void }>(). Any event name dispatched must be declared in the type parameter.

error_pattern: onClose prop missing from component has no default export
solution_script: Add 'export let onClose: (() => void) | undefined = undefined;' to the component's <script> block when the parent component passes an onClose prop.

error_pattern: Property content_type does not exist on type string tool_result
solution_script: Widen the tool_result type in AssistantMessage interface from 'string | null' to 'string | { content_type: string; data?: number[] } | null'. Use a $: reactive variable to narrow the type before using in the template.

error_pattern: Property extended_thinking does not exist on type ModelDataSummary
solution_script: Add 'extended_thinking?: boolean;' as an optional field to the ModelDataSummary interface in src/lib/types/model_data.ts.

error_pattern: BuildVisionContextParams missing required fields frameCaptured visionAttachmentReady
solution_script: Add all required fields to test objects when calling buildVisionContextMessage: { ..., frameCaptured: false, visionAttachmentReady: false }.

error_pattern: Type string is not assignable to Tab in Svelte each block
solution_script: Define a typed constant array in the script block (e.g. const TABS: Tab[] = ['a','b','c']) and use it in {#each TABS as tab} instead of an inline string array. Also add a wrapper function setTabFromString(s: string) { setTab(s as Tab); } for template event handlers.

error_pattern: Type string not assignable to chess go spectatingType
solution_script: Create a typed helper function: function watchGame(sessionId: string, gameType: string) { spectatingType = (gameType === 'go' ? 'go' : 'chess') as 'chess' | 'go'; } and call it from the template instead of assigning inline.

error_pattern: renderer.code type mismatch marked Renderer code property
solution_script: Cast the renderer object to bypass strict marked type: (renderer as any).code = (...) => {...}. The newer marked versions changed the code renderer signature from (code, infostring, escaped) to ({ text, lang }).

error_pattern: Property dataset does not exist on type Element
solution_script: Cast Element to HTMLElement when accessing .dataset: (el as HTMLElement).dataset. The dataset property exists on HTMLElement but not on the base Element interface.

error_pattern: category test not assignable to activity category type
solution_script: Use a valid category value in pushActivity calls (ui, tool, swarm, chat, system, terminal) or cast to any: { category: 'ui' as any }. The 'test' category is not a valid activity category.

error_pattern: description[..Math.min] Python-style slice syntax not valid JavaScript
solution_script: Replace Python-style slice 'str[..n]' with JavaScript 'str.slice(0, n)'. JavaScript uses .slice(start, end) not the Python [start..end] syntax.

error_pattern: as 9 | 13 | 19 boardSize GoBoard union type cast in template
solution_script: Move the board size cast to a $: reactive declaration: '$: goBoardSize = (message.game_state?.board_size ?? 19) as 9 | 13 | 19;' and pass {goBoardSize} to the boardSize prop.

error_pattern: SurvivalOverlay description slice Python range operator
solution_script: Replace 'description[..Math.min(description.length, 200)]' with 'description.slice(0, 200)' in all Svelte/TypeScript components.

error_pattern: SettingsPanel on:change e.target as HTMLInputElement TypeScript cast
solution_script: Replace (e.target as HTMLInputElement).value with e.currentTarget.value in all Svelte on:change, on:input event handlers. e.currentTarget is already typed to the bound element.

error_pattern: AssistantMessage boardSize as 9|13|19 JSDoc comment not honored
solution_script: JSDoc /** @type */ casts in Svelte 4 template attributes are unreliable. Always use a script-level $: reactive declaration with a TypeScript 'as' cast to create a properly typed binding.

error_pattern: unused import LaneKind bonsai-transfer-core
solution_script: Run 'cargo fix --lib -p bonsai-transfer-core' or manually remove the unused LaneKind import from crates/bonsai-transfer-core/src/scheduler.rs line 165.

error_pattern: unused import async_trait bonsai-ring
solution_script: Run 'cargo fix --lib -p bonsai-ring' to automatically remove unused async_trait imports in crates/bonsai-ring/src/lib.rs.

error_pattern: variable does not need to be mutable bonsai-ir codegen
solution_script: Run 'cargo fix --lib -p bonsai-ir --tests' to remove unnecessary 'mut' keyword from 'let mut cg = RustCodegen::new()' in crates/bonsai-ir/src/codegen.rs lines 558 and 582.

error_pattern: tauri_plugin_notification NotificationExt not in scope
solution_script: Add 'use tauri_plugin_notification::NotificationExt;' at the top of the Rust file before calling .notification().builder(). This trait must be in scope for the method to be available on AppHandle.

error_pattern: tauri-plugin-notification not in Cargo.toml
solution_script: Add 'tauri-plugin-notification = "2"' to the [dependencies] section of src-tauri/Cargo.toml. Also add permissions in capabilities/default.json: notification:default, notification:allow-notify, notification:allow-request-permission.

error_pattern: Svelte 4 JSDoc cast Expected } parse error in each block
solution_script: JSDoc comments in Svelte 4 {#each} block expressions cause parse errors. Define a typed constant array in the script block instead: 'const ITEMS: MyType[] = [...]' and reference it in the template.

error_pattern: createEventDispatcher dispatch event type not registered
solution_script: Every custom event dispatched via dispatch() must be registered in the createEventDispatcher generic parameter. Add any new event names to: createEventDispatcher<{ existingEvent: void; newEvent: void }>()

error_pattern: brain_metadata chrono not in scope
solution_script: The chrono crate is already a transitive dependency via training_job.rs. Reference it as 'use chrono::Utc;' in brain_metadata.rs without adding it to Cargo.toml separately.

error_pattern: gguf safetensors bin model files committed to git
solution_script: Add *.gguf, *.safetensors, *.bin, *.jsonl, memory_nodes.db*, survival.db*, brain_metadata.json, training output directories to .gitignore. Run 'git rm --cached <file>' for any already-tracked model files.

error_pattern: HF_HUB_OFFLINE TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE not set in Python training script
solution_script: All Python training scripts must set at the top: os.environ['TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE'] = '1'; os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'; os.environ['HF_DATASETS_OFFLINE'] = '1'. Also pass local_files_only=True to all from_pretrained() calls.

error_pattern: GamePanel TournamentPanel has no default export module
solution_script: When a Svelte component has a TypeScript syntax error inside it (like an 'as' cast in a template expression), the whole component fails to compile and appears to have no default export to importing files. Fix the TypeScript errors inside the component first.

error_pattern: survival run_script executes arbitrary shell string command injection
solution_script: The survival system's run_script() in survival.rs executes solution_script strings via cmd /C or sh -c. Ensure the safety gate in ai_repair_error() actually validates script content before it is stored. Prefer allow-listed commands over free-form shell strings for automated repair.
